reservations.name: Udatsu Sushi
reservations.details: Michelin omakase sushi — smart casual required (no tees/shorts/sandals). Arrive 5 min before.

reservations.name: Omotesando Ukai-tei
reservations.details: Teppanyaki for 4 — dress nice-ish (smart casual)

reservations.name: Matsuzaka Gyu Yakiniku M Hozenji-Hanare
reservations.details: Wagyu yakiniku (birthday dinner)

reservations.name: Pizza Bar on 38th
reservations.details: Omakase pizza (#2 in world) — 8 seats

reservations.name: Sushi Yoshikawa
reservations.details: 17-piece omakase incl. dragon ball roll (otoro+uni)

reservations.name: teamLab Planets
reservations.details: 4 tickets, 3:00-3:30 PM entry

reservations.name: Shibuya Sky
reservations.details: 6:20 PM sunset slot — 229m observation deck above Shibuya Crossing

reservations.name: Chopstick Making Workshop
reservations.details: Custom chopsticks for 4

reservations.name: Camellia Tea Ceremony
reservations.details: Kyoto traditional matcha whisking — machiya setting

reservations.name: Casiopea at Billboard Live Osaka
reservations.details: Japanese jazz fusion legends — Herbis Plaza ENT, Nishi-Umeda. Early dinner at Sodaisho before.

reservations.name: Shinjuku Sumo Show
reservations.details: 90-min sumo show — bilingual MC, 3 matches + photo session. Sekisaku Bldg 2F, Okubo 2-5-22. Late entry refused — leave Nakajima by 12:00 sharp.

reservations.name: Shinjuku Pit Inn — Suga Dairo Trio
reservations.details: Golden Week Special — Kyu Suga Dairo (piano), Hikaru Toho (bass), Masatsugi Hattori (drums). Open 7:00 PM, show 7:30. ¥3,850 includes one drink.

reservations.name: Samurai Restaurant (Kabukicho)
reservations.details: Choreographed neon-and-drumming show in former Robot Restaurant space — 90 min show, ticket includes show + bento or 2 drinks. 4 tickets.

reservations.name: Kamogawa Odori (geisha dance)
reservations.bookingMethod: Pontocho Kaburenjo Theater website
reservations.alarm: Doesn't overlap with Kyoto stay (May 1-3). Could day-trip from Osaka if an afternoon slot exists.

reservations.name: Gen Yamamoto
reservations.bookingMethod: Phone only (7 days ahead)
reservations.alarm: Call May 2 to book May 9. Phone reservations only, directly from guests.

reservations.name: Yoshikawa Tempura (Kyoto)
reservations.details: Counter-seat tempura in machiya w/ koi pond
reservations.bookingMethod: Phone

reservations.name: Gion Takuma (Kyoto)
reservations.details: Affordable kaiseki along Shirakawa river
reservations.bookingMethod: Phone/online

reservations.name: Assemblages Kakimoto
reservations.details: Matcha parfait
reservations.bookingMethod: Online

reservations.name: Tonkatsu Sugita
reservations.details: Bib Gourmand tonkatsu — rosu katsu
reservations.bookingMethod: Omakase.in or byFood

reservations.name: Nokishita 711 (Kyoto)
reservations.details: Cocktail omakase (5 cocktails + snacks)
reservations.bookingMethod: TableCheck

reservations.name: Gyukatsu Motomura Shibuya
reservations.details: Beef cutlet — DIY grilling at table
reservations.bookingMethod: Arrive 7pm. 30-60 min wait. Cash OK. 5-10 min walk from hotel.

reservations.name: Fuunji
reservations.details: Tsukemen (dipping ramen) — get special size 400g
reservations.bookingMethod: JR Yamanote 1 stop to Shinjuku + 5-8 min walk. 15-30 min wait. Cash/vending machine.

reservations.name: Sakuragaoka (Cerulean Tower Tokyu Hotel)
reservations.details: Traditional Japanese breakfast buffet — grilled fish, rice, miso, tofu, tamagoyaki, pickles, fruit, coffee
reservations.bookingMethod: Walk-in OK (buffet is separate from TableCheck reservations, which are for lunch/dinner kaiseki). 7:00-10:30 AM (LO 10:00). 5-7 min walk from Granbell. Phone +81-3-3476-3000 to confirm if needed.

reservations.name: Nanamica Daikanyama
reservations.details: nanamica flagship + North Face Purple Label — full collection. 26-13 Sarugakucho. Opens 11:00 AM. ~3 min walk from Daikanyama T-Site.
reservations.bookingMethod: 11:00-19:00 daily. Allow 20-30 min. Leave by 11:35 to make Udatsu 11:55.

reservations.name: Kurono Tokyo Aoyama
reservations.details: Hajime Asaoka's Kurono Tokyo watches. Kita-Aoyama 2-10-22, ~5-7 min from Omotesando / Gaienmae Stn. Phone +81-3-6823-8358.
reservations.bookingMethod: Mon-Sat 11:00-19:00. Closed Sun + national holidays — Apr 29 (Showa Day) is closed, so Mon Apr 27 is the only viable day.

reservations.name: Kiddyland Harajuku — Licca-chan doll
reservations.details: Pick up Licca-chan doll for Yeva. 6-1-9 Jingumae, 3 min from Meiji-Jingumae Stn.
reservations.bookingMethod: Holiday hours 10:30 AM-9:00 PM (weekday 11-9).

reservations.name: Houseki Hiroba Shibuya
reservations.details: Massive secondhand watch inventory — Rolex, Grand Seiko, Omega. 5 min from Granbell. Tax-free with passport.
reservations.bookingMethod: 11:00-19:30 daily. If Houseki strikes out → Grand Seiko Osaka Shinsaibashi on May 5.

reservations.name: Shibuya SAUNAS (Alyona + Gail flex)
reservations.details: Modern Tokyo sauna — 9 sauna rooms + 4 cold plunge baths. 18-9 Sakuragaoka-cho — 30 sec from Granbell. Tattoo-friendly. WOODS / LÄMPI alternate by odd/even date — Apr 29 = odd, check signage.
reservations.bookingMethod: 8 AM-midnight. Phone 03-6627-4757. Skip-able if Alyona doesn't feel it today.

reservations.name: Loft Shibuya
reservations.details: 6 floors of Japanese design goods, stationery, kitchenware. 21-1 Udagawacho, 3 min from Shibuya Stn.
reservations.bookingMethod: 10:00-21:00 daily. ~15 min quick browse on the way to Midori.

reservations.name: Grand Seiko Boutique Osaka Shinsaibashi
reservations.details: World's largest Seiko/Grand Seiko store (333+ m²). Backup if Houseki Hiroba strikes out. Osaka Toyota Bldg 1F, 4-3-11 Minamisenba. Tax-free with passport.
reservations.bookingMethod: Allow ~45 min. Skip if Brad already bought a watch at Houseki.

reservations.name: Nakajima
reservations.details: Michelin sardine set lunch — Yanagawa Nabe set (990¥) — PRIMARY FOR APR 28 LUNCH
reservations.bookingMethod: Closed Sun+Mon; open Tue-Sat lunch 11:30-2:00. Queue by 11:00-11:15 for 11:30 opening. 30-45 min if arriving later. Cash.

reservations.name: Shabu-Shabu Tsukada (Shibuya Scramble Square 12F)
reservations.details: A5 wagyu individual hot pots — view of Scramble Crossing
reservations.bookingMethod: Open Sun 11am-4pm + 5pm-11pm. Same building as Shibuya Sky — elevator down from Sky's exit floor. Walk-in or call for last-minute reservation.

reservations.name: I'm Donut?
reservations.details: Brioche donuts w/ cream filling
reservations.bookingMethod: Arrive 30 min before 10am opening. Sells out by early afternoon.

reservations.name: Udon Maruka
reservations.details: Kamaage udon (Sanuki-style dipping)
reservations.bookingMethod: Queue by 10:00-10:30 for 11am opening. Cash only. Sells out early.

reservations.name: Nakiryu
reservations.details: Tantanmen (spicy dan dan noodle) — Apr 28 ramen backup if Nakajima too crowded; or May 9 lunch
reservations.bookingMethod: Arrive 10:30 AM (opens 11 AM). 30 min-1 hr wait. Cash only. Location: 南大塚2-34-4 Toshima. Transit: subway to Minamiotsuka Stn (Marunouchi Line), 5 min walk.

reservations.name: Ramen Menmaru
reservations.details: Sho yu ramen
reservations.bookingMethod: Near Sensoji Temple, 5 min from Kappabashi. Walk-in, typically 20-30 min wait.

reservations.name: Tonari Ramen
reservations.details: Tonkotsu (pork broth) ramen
reservations.bookingMethod: Kappabashi area, 3 min walk from Tsubaya knives. Cash preferred.

reservations.name: Midori Sushi
reservations.details: Omakase nigiri — generous toro
reservations.bookingMethod: Arrive by 5:30-6pm. 60-90 min GW wait.

reservations.name: Mizuno (Osaka)
reservations.details: Yamaimo-yaki okonomiyaki
reservations.bookingMethod: Arrive by 12:30pm. 30-45 min GW wait.

reservations.name: Harukoma (Osaka)
reservations.details: A la carte sushi — toro, uni, anago
reservations.bookingMethod: Arrive by 10:30-11am. 30-60 min GW wait. Cash preferred.

reservations.name: Hikiniku to Come (Kyoto)
reservations.details: Charcoal-grilled hamburger w/ rice & miso
reservations.bookingMethod: Arrive 30-45 min before dinner rush (by 5:45pm). Walk-in only.

reservations.name: % Arabica Higashiyama
reservations.details: Coffee with Yasaka Pagoda view
reservations.bookingMethod: Go right at 8am opening. GW lines 20-30 min by 10am.

reservations.name: Shinkansen: Tokyo → Kyoto
reservations.bookingMethod: BOOKED

reservations.name: Shinkansen: Shin-Osaka → Odawara
reservations.bookingMethod: BOOKED

reservations.name: Shinkansen: Odawara → Tokyo
reservations.bookingMethod: SmartEX app or buy at station
reservations.alarm: Book when available or buy day-of

alarms.action: Follow on Instagram — required for "membership" before you can DM to reserve
Follow on Instagram — check IG night of May 2 for closures, register Airwait 9:30 AM day-of
Call to reserve — phone only, 7 days ahead, directly from guests
